rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Here is the outline of the operation.
It is extremely simple.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0020
rows.name:
We will deploy defense units
around this ship to escort it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0030
rows.name:
This ship will proceed straight ahead
and storm the enemy stronghold.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0040
rows.name:
After breaching, the
assault team will sortie.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0050
rows.name:
They will make a beeline for
Void and annihilate him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0060
rows.name:
Then they will return the core to
the Ares and head back to this ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0070
rows.name:
Finally, we will carry out the transfer
and escape from Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0080
rows.name:
After breaching, this ship will remain at the enemy
stronghold as a forward base and support all units.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0090
rows.name:
The defense units will
continue their escort duties.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0100
rows.name: That is the outline.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0110
rows.name: Storming them head-on is pretty bold.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0120
rows.name: Well, even if we stay here,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0125
rows.name:
we'll just end up swallowed by the
disappearance phenomenon anyway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0130
rows.name:
Besides, it will shorten the distance we
have to return after retrieving the core.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0140
rows.name: It really is killing two birds with one stone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0150
rows.name: Yeah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0160
rows.name: It has a lot of risks, but it's a good plan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0170
rows.name:
We were only able to make it happen
thanks to Director General Maurice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0180
rows.name:
This operation will also
expose civilians to danger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0190
rows.name:
But the Director General spoke with every race's
representatives beforehand and secured their approval.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0200
rows.name:
Tatsu's Kaa-chan also said that
Director General Maurice's words[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0210
rows.name: deeply moved her heart, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0220
rows.name:
Director General Maurice,
thank you very much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0230
rows.name: I merely did my job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0240
rows.name: Your cheeks are red, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0250
rows.name:
Lastly, regarding the overall
commander of this operation,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0260
rows.name: Vandham will take that role.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0270
rows.name: I leave the rest to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0280
rows.name: The operation is exactly as you just heard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0290
rows.name: We're getting right to it, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0300
rows.name:
I think you already know, but you lot standing
in front of me are the assault team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0310
rows.name:
I made a comprehensive judgment
including your past achievements.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0320
rows.name:
Anyone who wants to decline can
walk out of this room right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0330
rows.name: Good.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0340
rows.name: The leader of this team is Elma.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0350
rows.name: It's you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0360
rows.name: I won't hear any complaints.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0370
rows.name: Understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0380
rows.name: Next, as for the leader of the defense units,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0390
rows.name:
Commander Ga Bou of the Larsian
army will take that role.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0400
rows.name:
Finally, regarding support for the units from this
ship, the Ma-non representative gladly accepted the task,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0410
rows.name: so we will handle that jointly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0420
rows.name: Leave it entirely to us, yo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0430
rows.name: That is all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0440
rows.name: There is still time before we sortie.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0450
rows.name:
You can't relax too much,
but everyone get some rest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0460
rows.name: Dismissed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33090100_MSG0470
rows.name: Roger![ST:wait ]
